name: http-logging-service-hono
description: A WebAssembly component HTTP service using the Hono web framework and wasi:logging

scripts.generate:types: rimraf generated/types && jco guest-types wit/ -o generated/types
scripts.setup:wit: npm run fetch:wit && npm run generate:types
scripts.build: npm run setup:wit && npm run build:ts && npm run build:component
